code: import React from'react';import{Link,useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";function Navbar(){const navigate=useNavigate();const user=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('user')||'null');const handleLogout=()=>{localStorage.removeItem('token');localStorage.removeItem('user');navigate('/');};const getInitials=name=>{if(!name)return'?';return name.split(' ').map(n=>n[0]).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0,2);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("nav",{className:"navbar",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:"/dashboard",className:"navbar-brand",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"logo-icon",children:"\uD83C\uDFE0"}),"PropertyHub"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"navbar-links",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/dashboard",className:"nav-link",children:"Dashboard"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/properties/new",className:"nav-link",children:"+ Add Property"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"nav-user",children:[user&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"nav-user-avatar",children:getInitials(user.name)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{className:"nav-user-name",children:user.name})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn-logout",onClick:handleLogout,children:"Logout"})]})]});}export default Navbar;
